attributes.description: Tech Mahindra Ltd provides comprehensive range of IT services, including IT enabled service, application development and maintenance, consulting and enterprise business solutions, etc. to a diversified base of corporate customers in a wide range of industries.[1]

Tech Mahindra Ltd provides comprehensive range of IT services, including IT enabled service, application development and maintenance, consulting and enterprise business solutions, etc. to a diversified base of corporate customers in a wide range of industries.[1]
